verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If you ever feeling down And like you have nowhere to go, If you feeling like an outcast as your problems overflow, Just remember, there is someone And all it takes is for you to know Is that God is the answer and God answers prayers.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He sees every weakness, every trials, Every mountain and sea, And He sees every teardrop, and He wipes them for me I get down on my knee and I say, "Savior, help me please", Because it's one thing is for certain is my God answers prayers.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You may be broken and feel battered, But your strength will surely come, In the midst of all your heartache, Your battles are already won, Just remember in the hard times, Don't give up, don't say you're done, Because God is the answer and God answers prayers.
